use_cases: Displaying award badges on product pages to showcase recognition
Adding credibility to developer tools and SaaS products
Featuring product rankings (gold, silver, bronze) in portfolios
Highlighting product launches with Product Hunt-style badges
Creating interactive award showcases with 3D hover effects
ai_summary: An interactive award badge component that displays product achievements like Golden Kitty Awards, Product of the Day, Week, or Month. Features sophisticated 3D mouse-following tilt effects using CSS matrix transforms and smooth overlay animations for a premium, polished appearance. Supports multiple award types with distinct color schemes (golden, silver, bronze) and optional clickable links.
